query:
INSERT INTO memory_context (userId, taskId, taskTitle, summary, keywords, memoryType, importance, expiresAt, createdAt) VALUES
(1, 810017, '[资源存档] L013 Anthropic Skills', 'CATEGORY:SKILLS_SYSTEM | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:Apache-2.0_partial | STARS:102800 | LANG:Markdown | CORE:Anthropic official Claude skill implementations — instructions, scripts, resources Claude dynamically loads for specialized tasks. CAPABILITIES:[creative_design_skills,dev_technical_skills_web_testing_MCP_generation,enterprise_communication_skills,document_processing_docx_pdf_pptx_xlsx,Agent_Skills_spec_template,built_in_Claude.ai_paid] USAGE:[SKILL_PLUGIN] INTEGRATION_NOTES:SKILL.md standard directly compatible with TARGET_SYSTEM (Manus); document processing skills (xlsx/pdf) applicable to financial report analysis; use as reference for creating custom investment analysis skills. URL:https://github.com/anthropics/skills', 'Anthropic,Claude技能,SKILL.md,文档处理,Excel,PDF,投资分析技能', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810018, '[资源存档] L014 Free LLM API Resources', 'CATEGORY:LLM_ENGINEERING | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:UNSPECIFIED | STARS:17000 | LANG:Python | CORE:Aggregated list of LLM API services offering free tiers or trial credits with detailed rate limits and supported models. CAPABILITIES:[free_LLM_API_providers,trial_credit_providers,detailed_rate_limits_RPM_TPM_RPD,supported_model_list,auto_update_Python_script,excludes_non_compliant] USAGE:[DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Use to identify fallback LLM providers when primary API quota exhausted; useful for cost optimization in TARGET_SYSTEM multi-model routing. URL:https://github.com/cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources', '免费LLM API,速率限制,模型列表,备用LLM,成本优化', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810019, '[资源存档] L015 OpenBB Open Data Platform', 'CATEGORY:FINANCIAL_DATA | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:AGPLv3 | STARS:63600 | LANG:Python | CORE:Open-source financial data integration framework exposing proprietary, licensed, public data sources to Python, Excel, MCP Server, REST API via connect-once-use-everywhere architecture. CAPABILITIES:[unified_financial_data_integration,simultaneous_Python_Excel_MCP_REST_exposure,OpenBB_Workspace_enterprise_UI_AI_agents,ODP_Python_CLI,data_provider_plugin_Bloomberg_Refinitiv] USAGE:[PIP,CLI,API,WEB_APP] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPLv3 requires licensing review; MCP Server enables direct AI agent invocation; plugin system can extend TARGET_SYSTEM 37 existing data sources; Python package callable from server-side tRPC. URL:https://github.com/OpenBB-finance/OpenBB', 'OpenBB,金融数据平台,MCP服务器,Bloomberg,数据集成,Python,量化', 'workflow', 5, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810020, '[资源存档] L016 OpenClaw 101', 'CATEGORY:LEARNING_RESOURCE | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Chinese-language resource aggregation site for Claude Code with 35+ tutorials, 7-day learning path, scenario-based skill recommendations. CAPABILITIES:[35+_tutorials_aggregated,7_day_learning_path,scenario_skill_recommendations,Chinese_English_bilingual,filter_search] USAGE:[WEB_APP,DOCS_REF] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Chinese-language learning resource only; no direct integration; useful for team skill development in Claude Code. URL:https://github.com/mengjian-github/openclaw101', 'Claude Code,中文教程,学习路径,技能推荐,7天入门', 'workflow', 2, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810021, '[资源存档] L017 Shannon AI Pentest', 'CATEGORY:SECURITY | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0_Lite_COMMERCIAL_Pro | STARS:34600 | LANG:Python | CORE:Autonomous white-box AI penetration testing tool analyzing source code, identifying attack vectors, executing real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before production. CAPABILITIES:[fully_autonomous_no_human_intervention,reproducible_PoC_exploits,OWASP_coverage,code_aware_dynamic_testing_white_box,static_dynamic_correlation_precise_source_location,parallel_processing,Pro_self_hosted_source_never_leaves_network] USAGE:[CLI,SAAS] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Run against TARGET_SYSTEM itself for security auditing; AGPL-3.0 Lite free for non-commercial; Pro for production CI/CD pipeline integration. URL:https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon', '渗透测试,安全审计,白盒测试,OWASP,漏洞利用,CI/CD安全', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810022, '[资源存档] L018 visual-explainer', 'CATEGORY:SKILLS_SYSTEM | TYPE:GITHUB_TOOL | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:6900 | LANG:JavaScript | CORE:Agent skill converting complex terminal output (ASCII tables, diffs, architecture, plans) into styled self-contained HTML pages with Mermaid charts and Chart.js dashboards. CAPABILITIES:[terminal_to_HTML_auto_conversion,Mermaid_interactive_charts,Chart.js_dashboards,dark_light_theme,slideshow_mode,zero_build_zero_dependencies,Vercel_deployment,auto_detect_complex_tables,compatible_Claude_Code_Pi_Codex] USAGE:[SKILL_PLUGIN,CLI] INTEGRATION_NOTES:SKILL.md compatible with TARGET_SYSTEM (Manus); install as Manus skill to improve analysis report visualization; Chart.js output embeddable in TARGET_SYSTEM frontend; MIT unrestricted. URL:https://github.com/nicobailon/visual-explainer', 'Agent技能,可视化输出,Mermaid图表,Chart.js,HTML报告,SKILL.md,Manus技能', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810023, '[资源存档] L019 Page Agent Alibaba', 'CATEGORY:BROWSER_AUTOMATION | TYPE:GITHUB_LIB | LICENSE:MIT | LANG:TypeScript | CORE:Alibaba GUI agent controlling web interfaces via natural language without browser extensions or Python — client-side DOM manipulation only. CAPABILITIES:[natural_language_DOM_operation,no_extension_no_Python,BYOLLM,optional_Chrome_extension_multi_page,MCP_server_beta,npm_CDN] USAGE:[NPM,CDN] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Client-side TypeScript directly embeddable in TARGET_SYSTEM React frontend; enables natural language UI automation within investment platform; MIT unrestricted; based on browser-use. URL:https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent', '前端GUI代理,DOM操作,自然语言,TypeScript,客户端嵌入,阿里巴巴', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810024, '[资源存档] L020 PageEyes Agent Tencent', 'CATEGORY:BROWSER_AUTOMATION | TYPE:GITHUB_LIB | LICENSE:MIT | STARS:1212 | LANG:Python | CORE:Tencent Music lightweight UI Agent using natural language for cross-platform (Web/Android/HarmonyOS/iOS) automated testing powered by OmniParserV2. CAPABILITIES:[natural_language_no_script,cross_platform_Web_Android_HarmonyOS_iOS,multi_LLM_DeepSeek_OpenAI_Qwen,no_vision_LLM_dependency_small_LLM_sufficient,natural_language_assertions,detailed_logs_reports] USAGE:[PIP] INTEGRATION_NOTES:Python-based; invoke from server-side for automated UI testing of TARGET_SYSTEM; no vision LLM dependency reduces cost; primarily for QA automation. URL:https://github.com/tencentmusic/page-eyes-agent', '跨平台UI自动化,OmniParser,自然语言测试,腾讯,无视觉LLM,QA自动化', 'workflow', 3, NULL, NOW()),

(1, 810025, '[资源存档] L021 MiroFish', 'CATEGORY:MULTI_AGENT | TYPE:GITHUB_FRAMEWORK | LICENSE:AGPL-3.0 | STARS:42600 | LANG:Node.js | CORE:Multi-agent AI prediction engine extracting real-world seed info (news/policy/financial signals) to construct high-fidelity parallel digital worlds where thousands of agents with independent personalities evolve for scenario simulation. CAPABILITIES:[multi_agent_social_simulation_thousands,high_fidelity_parallel_digital_world,seed_material_input_financial_signals,natural_language_prediction,dynamic_variable_injection_god_view,knowledge_graph_dual_platform_simulation,prediction_report_generation,OASIS_engine_CAMEL_AI] USAGE:[DOCKER,CLI,WEB_APP] INTEGRATION_NOTES:AGPL-3.0 limits commercial embedding; financial signals as seed enables market scenario simulation — novel simulation-based prediction paradigm; potential as standalone microservice for scenario analysis module. URL:https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish', '多智能体,社会模拟,金融信号,场景预测,平行数字世界,仿真引擎,OASIS', 'workflow', 4, NULL, NOW());
